title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live Just Changed Voice Agents Forever

extracted.hook: Hey, so I think that these scissors are broken. These two different pieces came apart.

accelerates: discussing the benefits of Gemini 3.1 flash live
slows: explaining how to use Google AI Studio

extracted.vulnerability: "I don't really care about how you're doing. Can you just tell me a little bit more about the voice model?"
extracted.cta: If you guys learned something new or if you enjoyed, please give it a like. It helps me out a ton.
signature_phrases: "I appreciate you guys making it to the end of the video"
transitions: Now this first benchmark is about multi-step function calling, which it has outperformed the previous Gemini 2.5 flash model by about 19% here as you can see.
And I think it's really cool because I could definitely see a world where at some point our operating systems basically just work with voice.
Now there are some other things you can do in here.
analogies: "it's basically like you've got your asynchronous or synchronous"
